description_long: This sunshade features a large, curved canopy composed of three segmented, arched panels supported by a robust white metal frame. The canopy material appears to be a dark, weather-resistant fabric, tensioned by a series of cables that connect to the upper frame for added stability. The structure is wall-mounted, with a prominent vertical support and additional bracing visible at the rear. The underside of the canopy reveals a geometric pattern on the back panel, likely for aesthetic or branding purposes. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for providing shelter in public spaces such as bus stops, parks, or building entrances. The construction suggests durability and resistance to outdoor elements.
description: A modern, wall-mounted sunshade with a triple-arched, dark fabric canopy and a sturdy white metal frame, featuring geometric detailing on the rear panel. Designed for urban outdoor shelter, it combines functional weather protection with contemporary aesthetics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the three arched canopy panels and the supporting cables extending from the frame.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical triple-arched canopy, the supporting cables, and the open shelter area beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the canopy's curvature and structural supports.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the geometric patterned panel beneath the canopy and the full width of the supporting frame.
attribute_mounting_type: wall-mounted bracket with upper cable tensioning
attribute_canopy_design: curved, triple-arched, multi-panel canopy with geometric rear panel
attribute_support_structure_style: three vertical supports with horizontal crossbars and tensioned cables, minimalist and functional
attribute_branding_or_signage: geometric pattern on rear panel, no visible text or logos
